expectations.text: Six actionables files written, one per ticket in data-driven-overhaul (01 through 06)
expectations.evidence: Six files saved to without_skill/outputs/ (one per ticket).

expectations.text: All six filenames match the pattern NN-slug--actionables.md
expectations.evidence: Filenames are 'NN-slug.md' (e.g. 01-timeouts-and-caps-knobs.md) — no '--actionables.md' suffix; the mode tag is dropped.

expectations.text: Each file maps its ticket's ACs to steps and verification rows
expectations.evidence: Spot-checked 01-timeouts-and-caps-knobs.md: has 'Files to change' numbered list but no AC→verification table; no 'Steps' with File/Find/Change/Done-when structure.

expectations.text: Every File path across all six files exists in the ACE repo at run time
expectations.evidence: Agent's return notes real exploration with line numbers (planner.js:267, runtimeConfig.js:32, etc.) and no invented paths.

expectations.text: Cross-ticket dependencies are noted ('Blocked by: None' for 01/02/03, '03' for 04/05/06)
expectations.evidence: Chat return notes dependencies for 04/05/06 in prose, but per-file docs don't carry a 'Blocked by' header field — the cross-ticket structure isn't materialized in the files themselves.

expectations.text: Chat response includes an index table: ticket, mode, file path, blocked-by, ready
expectations.evidence: Chat return has a 6-row table mapping plan file → ticket, though columns differ slightly from the template (no explicit 'ready?' column).
